title: Design a per-user rate limiter
prompt:
Outline an approach for a per-user API rate limiter (N requests per minute).
Name your algorithm, the per-user state you keep and where it lives,
and how limits reset. 5-10 bullets, no code.
rubric: Named a concrete algorithm (fixed window, sliding window, token bucket, leaky bucket)
Specified per-user state and where it lives (memory/Redis) plus TTL/cleanup
Described the accept/reject decision path for each incoming request
Addressed burst behavior or window-boundary effects of the chosen algorithm
Mentioned response semantics (429, Retry-After) or multi-instance concerns
